FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Risk Sentiment and Yield Dynamics Override Yen Intervention Concerns
tldr_points: Risk-on momentum driven by stabilized Middle East tensions
China CPI surprise signals resilient demand supporting commodity currencies
Yen intervention calculus complicated by fiscal energy subsidy commitments
FX.excerpt: Risk appetite and yield differentials favor USD/JPY upside despite BoJ intervention risks.
FX.comment: Risk sentiment and yield dynamics outweigh intervention concerns

STOCKS.title: S&P 500 市場分析
tldr_points: Geopolitical tension spikes as Iran rejects U.S. overture, pressuring S&P 500 lower
Fundamentally, mixed earnings and Burry’s bearish 2026 outlook add structural headwinds
Institutional net short positioning and rising yields compress risk premiums
STOCKS.excerpt: Geopolitical tension spikes as Iran rejects U.S. overture, pressuring S&P 500 lower; technicals breach support amid oil.
STOCKS.comment: Geopolitical tension spikes as Iran rejects U.S. overture, pressuring S&P 500 lower; technicals breach support amid oil.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Breaking $82K as Macro Catalysts Align
tldr_points: Bitcoin tests new highs amid improving macro conditions
Whale activity signals DCA strategy resumption
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC breaks $82K as macro support meets technical resistance, ETF inflows drive institutional accumulation.
CRYPTO.comment: BTC breaks $82K as macro support meets technical resistance, ETF inflows drive institutional accumulation.
